violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed employee preparing food without washing hands.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Eggs, etc stored on floor in cooler and freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Meat, pasta, etc. stored in refrigerator, cooler, and freezer not date marked as required.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside hood system and filters contained build up of debris.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. To go trays need to be stored inverted or covered to protect from contamination.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Ceiling in kitchen area not in good repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed walls needing cleaned.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed employee taking money and then putting rolls on plates without washing hands.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed Frozen fried potatoes, tator gems, etc. stored on the floor in freezer. Observed hamburger stored on floor in walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket contained dish soap and bleach used to wipe tables. Sanitizer was not at proper concentration.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Food in refrigerator and walk in cooler were not labeled or date marked.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. Ice machine chute contain a buildup of substance that needed cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Vent filters contained excessive amount of grease and debris.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. Mop stored in storage room in the bucket of dirty water.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. single use large hinged sandwich containers were stored on floor in storage room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling was falling down in cooking area and part of bar area.
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
